results.rendered_html:
praśaṃsā
1 Praise, eulogy, panegyric, applause; praśaṃsāvacanaṃ ‘a complimentary or laudatory remark.’
2 Description, reference to; as in aprastutapraśaṃsā q. v.
3 Glory, fame, reputation.
Comp.
— upamā one of the several kinds of upamā mentioned by Daṇḍin; brahmaṇo'pyudbhavaḥ padmaścaṃdraḥ śaṃbhuśirodhṛtaḥ . tau tulyau tvanmukheneti sā praśaṃsopamocyate ..  Kāv. 2. 31. 
— mukhara a. loudly praising.
